zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势下行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD报6.5672，24小时微跌0.25%，价格运行于20日均线6.8224下方，显示中短期趋势仍偏空。日内波动区间为6.5569至6.6885，反映市场交投相对谨慎，空头暂时占据主导地位，反弹力度有限。

从技术指标来看，MACD值为-0.2237，处于零轴下方，说明市场动能依然偏弱，空方力量尚未明显衰减。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合均线位置与价格结构分析，当前尚未出现明确的趋势反转信号，需警惕进一步回落风险。

关键支撑位可关注6.55附近，若跌破该区域，价格可能进一步测试6.40一线。上方短期阻力位位于6.68至6.82区域，其中20日均线附近构成较强压制，只有有效突破并站稳，才有望改善当前偏空格局。

交易策略方面，稳健投资者可继续保持观望，等待价格突破关键阻力后再考虑顺势布局。激进交易者可关注6.55支撑表现，若出现放量反弹信号可尝试短线参与，但应严格设置止损，控制仓位以防市场继续下探。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD remains under short-term bearish pressure, with price trading at 6.5672 and sitting below the 20-day simple moving average at 6.8224. The gap beneath the SMA suggests sellers still control momentum, while the narrow intraday range between 6.5569 and 6.6885 reflects hesitation rather than strong directional conviction. The modest 24-hour decline of 0.25% indicates weakness, though downside acceleration appears limited for now.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD reading at -0.2237 points to lingering bearish momentum, implying the market has yet to establish a convincing recovery phase. Since the signal line and RSI(14) are unavailable, confirmation of oversold or reversal conditions remains incomplete. Even so, negative MACD territory generally favors defensive positioning until momentum begins flattening or turning upward.

From a price structure perspective, immediate support is forming near the recent low around 6.55, with a more meaningful defensive zone likely emerging near 6.40 if selling intensifies. On the upside, resistance appears close to 6.69, followed by a stronger technical barrier near the SMA(20) around 6.82. A decisive move above this moving average could improve sentiment and open room for a broader recovery attempt.

Traders may consider a cautious approach in the current environment. Conservative participants could wait for confirmation above 6.69–6.82 before considering bullish exposure, as reclaiming resistance would indicate improving momentum. Short-term range traders may monitor rebounds from support near 6.55, though strict risk management is essential. If price breaks below support convincingly, downside continuation remains the more probable near-term scenario.
